predictions.generated: SELECT d.name FROM Dogs d JOIN Owners o ON d.owner_id = o.owner_id JOIN Charges c ON o.owner_id = c.owner_id WHERE c.charge_amount <= 1000

predictions.question: Find the average age of students who do not have any pet .?
predictions.reference: SELECT AVG(age) FROM student WHERE stuid NOT IN (SELECT stuid FROM has_pet)
predictions.generated: SELECT AVG(age) FROM student WHERE stuid NOT IN (SELECT stuid FROM has_pet)

predictions.question: How many flights do we have?
predictions.reference: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FLIGHTS
predictions.generated: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flight_2.Flights

predictions.question: What is the maximum and minimum share for the TV series?
predictions.reference: SELECT MAX(SHARE) , MIN(SHARE) FROM TV_series
predictions.generated: SELECT MAX(SHARE) AS max_share, MIN(SHARE) AS min_share FROM TV_series

predictions.question: How many templates do we have?
predictions.reference: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Templates
predictions.generated: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT template_id) FROM Templates

predictions.question: Find all airlines that have fewer than 200 flights.?
predictions.reference: SELECT T1.Airline FROM AIRLINES AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.uid = T2.Airline GROUP BY T1.Airline HAVING COUNT(*) < 200
predictions.generated: SELECT Airline FROM flight_2.FLIGHTS GROUP BY Airline HAVING COUNT(FlightNo) < 200

predictions.question: Find the name of the employee who got the highest one time bonus.?
predictions.reference: SELECT t1.name FROM employee AS t1 JOIN evaluation AS t2 ON t1.Employee_ID = t2.Employee_ID ORDER BY t2.bonus DESC LIMIT 1
predictions.generated: SELECT name FROM employee WHERE bonus = (SELECT MAX(bonus) FROM employee WHERE bonus IS NOT NULL AND bonus != 0)

predictions.question: What are the id, name and membership level of visitors who have spent the largest amount of money in total in all museum tickets?
predictions.reference: SELECT t2.visitor_id , t1.name , t1.Level_of_membership FROM visitor AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.visitor_id GROUP BY t2.visitor_id ORDER BY SUM(t2.Total_spent) DESC LIMIT 1
predictions.generated: SELECT v.id, v.name, v.Level_of_membership FROM visitor v JOIN visit vi ON v.id = vi.visitor_id WHERE (vi.museum_id, vi.Total_spent) IN ( SELECT museum_id, MAX(Total_spent) FROM visit GROUP BY museum_id )

predictions.question: Show the ids of high schoolers who have friends and are also liked by someone else.?
predictions.reference: SELECT student_id FROM Friend INTERSECT SELECT liked_id FROM Likes
predictions.generated: SELECT H1.id FROM Highschooler H1 JOIN Friend F ON H1.id = F.id JOIN Highschooler H2 ON H2.id = F.student_id WHERE H1.id NOT IN (SELECT L.student_id FROM Likes L)

predictions.question: Return the money rank of the poker player with the greatest height.?
predictions.reference: SELECT T2.Money_Rank FROM people AS T1 JOIN poker_player AS T2 ON T1.People_ID = T2.People_ID ORDER BY T1.Height DESC LIMIT 1
predictions.generated: SELECT MAX(Money_Rank) FROM people

predictions.question: Find the program which most number of students are enrolled in. List both the id and the summary.?
predictions.reference: SELECT T1.degree_program_id , T1.degree_summary_name FROM Degree_Programs AS T1 JOIN Student_Enrolment AS T2 ON T1.degree_program_id = T2.degree_program_id GROUP BY T1.degree_program_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
predictions.generated: SELECT degree_program_id, degree_summary_name FROM degree_programs WHERE degree_program_id = ( SELECT degree_program_id FROM student_enrolment GROUP BY degree_program_id ORDER BY COUNT(degree_program_id) DESC LIMIT 1 )

predictions.question: Give the nationality that is most common across all people.?
predictions.reference: SELECT Nationality FROM people GROUP BY Nationality ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
predictions.generated: SELECT Nationality FROM people GROUP BY Nationality ORDER BY COUNT(Nationality) DESC LIMIT 1

predictions.question: Find the average life expectancy and total population for each continent where the average life expectancy is shorter than 72?
predictions.reference: SELECT SUM(Population) , AVG(LifeExpectancy) , Continent FROM country GROUP BY Continent HAVING AVG(LifeExpectancy) < 72
predictions.generated: SELECT AVG(LifeExpectancy), SUM(Population) FROM world_1.country GROUP BY Continent HAVING AVG(LifeExpectancy) < 72

predictions.question: How many distinct nationalities are there?
predictions.reference: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Nationality) FROM people
predictions.generated: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Nationality) FROM people

predictions.question: How many countries exist?
predictions.reference: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COUNTRIES
predictions.generated: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COUNTRIES

predictions.question: What are the names and release years for all the songs of the youngest singer?
predictions.reference: SELECT song_name , song_release_year FROM singer ORDER BY age LIMIT 1
predictions.generated: SELECT T2.song_name, T2.song_release_year FROM singer AS T1 JOIN singer_in_concert AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.singer_id JOIN concert AS T3 ON T2.concert_id = T3.id JOIN ( SELECT singer_id, MIN(age) AS min_age FROM singer GROUP BY singer_id ) AS T4 ON T1.id = T4.singer_id WHERE T1.id = T4.singer_id AND T1.age = T4.min_age

predictions.question: List the Episode of all TV series showed on TV Channel with series name "Sky Radio".?
predictions.reference: SELECT T2.Episode FROM TV_Channel AS T1 JOIN TV_series AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel WHERE T1.series_name = "Sky Radio"
predictions.generated: SELECT Episode FROM TV_series WHERE series_name = 'Sky Radio

predictions.question: Find the kind of program which most number of students are enrolled in?
predictions.reference: SELECT T1.degree_summary_name FROM Degree_Programs AS T1 JOIN Student_Enrolment AS T2 ON T1.degree_program_id = T2.degree_program_id GROUP BY T1.degree_summary_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
predictions.generated: SELECT degree_summary_name FROM degree_programs WHERE degree_program_id = (SELECT degree_program_id FROM students GROUP BY degree_program_id ORDER BY COUNT(degree_program_id) DESC LIMIT 1)

predictions.question: What the smallest version number and its template type code?
predictions.reference: SELECT MIN(Version_Number) , template_type_code FROM Templates
predictions.generated: SELECT MIN(version_number), template_type_code FROM Templates GROUP BY template_type_code

predictions.question: How many degrees does the engineering department have?
